posts.text:
True. 

New Roadster unveil probably in late April.


Massimo (@Rainmaker1973)

Today in 2008, Tesla began the regular production on its first car, the Tesla Roadster.

Also, a reminder that there's one Tesla Roadster in an elliptical heliocentric orbit crossing the orbit of Mars.





— https://nitter.net/Rainmaker1973/status/2033806792069984643#m

Critical feedback is appreciated


Bustin (@abustin)

We're reading all your feedback 👀

Keep the nitpicks coming!



— https://nitter.net/abustin/status/2033770243756331253#m

Vital to the future of America


Mike Lee (@BasedMikeLee)

After two years of preparation, the Senate will begin debating the SAVE America Act tomorrow

Once we’re on this bill, we must stay on it until it’s passed into law 

Filibustering senators must be required to speak—no Zombie Filibusters here

Get it done

Pass it on

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/BasedMikeLee/status/2033690203395961297#m

Wow


Charlie Smirkley (@charliesmirkley)

NYC spends more per homeless person than the median NYC household earns. $81,705 per person in FY2025.

And $81,705 is a floor. It excludes supportive housing (~$500M/yr), mental health response teams, and NYPD encampment costs. 

The city projects ~$97K per person in FY2026.





— https://nitter.net/charliesmirkley/status/2033383075422540105#m

AI will be so beautiful


paranoidream ♡︎ (@paranoidream)

Grok Imagine





— https://nitter.net/paranoidream/status/2033648248980967522#m
Btw, the proceeds of any legal victory in the OpenAI case will be donated to charity. I will in no way enrich myself.

Rocket garden at Starbase. 

You can see this from the public highway.


Dima Zeniuk (@DimaZeniuk)

Oscars have become unwatchable


Jimmy Failla (@jimmyfailla)

If the GODFATHER were made today it would NOT be eligible for an Oscar unless he transitioned to the Godmother and made someone an offer they couldn’t HEAR. You could still leave the gun but you couldn’t take the cannoli unless the baker supports gay marriage. RIP Hollywood.



— https://nitter.net/jimmyfailla/status/2033352868426641517#m
